title: Fast Paths
description: Sprint faster on established trails with a seamless movement speed boost exclusive to Path blocks.
body:
## Fast Paths

A minimalist utility designed to give a functional purpose to your terraforming. In standard Minecraft, dirt paths are purely decorative; this project changes that by granting players a subtle, natural speed increase while walking on any Dirt Path block.

It bridges the gap between early-game exploration and late-game transport, incentivizing players to actually build road networks between their bases and villages.

### Features
- Lightweight: Optimized to run smoothly as both a Mod and a Datapack.
- Immersive: No messy UI or complex mechanics—just walk on a path and feel the difference.
- Vanilla Friendly: Designed to feel like a feature Mojang forgot to add.
- Multiplayer: Full Multiplayer Support for Servers and LAN worlds

### How It Works:
Walking On Paths gives you a speed boost, allowing you to sprint without losing hunger.

### How to Install:
- Download the datapack and move it to your world datapack folder
- Restart the game
- You will recieve a message in the chat saying that the datapack has been intialized
